items.html: Now, at the time of the Yenika [suckling], she is the discernment of the last Hey of the Name, and she has the complete measure of the Sefira of Tifferet of ZA [Zeir Anpin]; and there is no complete Partzuf in her, only one whole and large measure. Therefore she is not yet called a minor, but the last Hey, as mentioned. She also has another name now, which is a rib [Tzela], as the verse says, "And the Lord God built the rib." For while she is a complete measure behind the Chazeh [chest] of ZA, she is called his rib; and afterwards she is built and made into a complete Partzuf at his back — and that is the building of the rib, as it is written, "And the Lord God built the rib," etc. Then she is called a minor throughout the time of her building.
